zh.Cleveland, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭
zh.Of Whorlton In Cleveland, Yorkshire, Eng: 英國英格蘭越可爾爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton於1274年12月6日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親Nicholas de Meinill30歲，母親Christian Huntingfield23歲。他去世於1322年4月26日在英國越可爾布洛頓享年47歲，埋葬在英國越可爾爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Norman, English: locative name from one of the French places named Mesnil, from Old French mesnil (Latin * mansionile, a diminutive of mansio ‘abode, habitation’), used of the country domain where a noble lived with his family and retainers. As a surname it may also be used of a member of the household, retainer. Some of the bearers listed below may belong to (2).
2 English: relationship name from the Continental Germanic female personal name Maginhild.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton was born on 6 December 1274, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de Meinill, was 30 and his mother, Christian Huntingfield, was 23. He died on 26 April 1322, in Brotton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton est né le 6 décembre 1274, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Meinill, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Christian Huntingfield, avait 23 ans. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1322, à Brotton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton am 6. Dezember 1274 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Meinill 30 und seine Mutter Christian Huntingfield 23. Er starb am 26. April 1322 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Brotton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton è nato il il 6 dicembre 1274 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas de Meinill, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Christian Huntingfield, aveva 23 anni. Morì il 26 aprile 1322, nel Brotton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Whorlton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorltonが1274年12月6日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Meinillは30歳，母Christian Huntingfieldは23歳であった。彼は1322年4月26日にイギリスヨークシュアイアブロットオンで47歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton(이)가 1274년 12월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Meinill(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Huntingfield(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1322년 4월 26일 영국 요르크실르 브로턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 화를턴에 묻혔다.

pt.6 December 1274–26 April 1322: 6 de dezembro de 1274–26 de abril de 1322
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton nasceu em 6 de dezembro de 1274, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Meinill, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Christian Huntingfield, tinha 23 anos. Ele faleceu em 26 de abril de 1322, em Brotton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton родился 6 декабря 1274 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Meinill было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Huntingfield, 23. Он умер 26 апреля 1322 г. в местности броттон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия.

es.6 December 1274–26 April 1322: 6 de diciembre de 1274–26 de abril de 1322
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Meynell Lord of Whorlton nació el 6 de diciembre de 1274, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas de Meinill, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Christian Huntingfield, tenía 23 años. Murió el 26 de abril de 1322, en Brotton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
